PLAINTIFF KALCO PROPERTIES INC. MOTION TO COMPEL DEFENDANT NANCY GITHOITHOS RESPONSES TO PLAINTIFFS FORM INTERROGATORIES - GENERAL SET ONE, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFENDANT NANCY GITHOITHO IN THE AMOUNT OF $585.00 (MOTIONS)
Off Calendar Apr-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

Plaintiff Kalco Properties Inc.'s Motion To Compel Defendant Nancy Githoithos Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories - General Set One, And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Nancy Githoitho In The Amount Of $585.00.

There being no appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

The unopposed motion is granted in full, including the request for sanctions.

The moving party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem at: JPDeol@dhillonlaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: John Paul Deol. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Not Present. Matter not reported. (JPT/302)

Motion To Compel Defendant Nancy Githoithos Responses To Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories - General Set One, And Request For Sanctions Against Defendant Nancy Githoitho In The Amount Of $585.00 (Motions)
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Text Ruling
